strengths: Over 18 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems.
Current role involves direct, hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Demonstrates strong initiative and leadership through founding an open-source project (GISCollective) and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Experience is at the Senior/Staff Engineer level, which may not align with the strategic scope of a Director-level individual contributor role.
Resume emphasizes hands-on software craftsmanship over high-level AI strategy, product direction, and customer advisory.
While recent work is in AI, the majority of his career and public contributions do not reflect deep, recognized expertise in the AI/ML field.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with recent, relevant experience in AI agent infrastructure. His entrepreneurial work on GISCollective and his history of leading workshops demonstrate strong initiative and mentorship qualities. However, his career trajectory and documented experience align more with a Senior or Staff Engineer role focused on technical implementation rather than the Director-level strategic scope required for this Principal Engineer position. There appears to be a significant gap in demonstrated experience with high-level AI strategy, customer advisory, and influencing roadmaps within a large organization.
